targets.rawSql:
SELECT case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end AS POL_NM
    --, FORMAT(AVG(started), 'HH:mm:ss') 
    , min(started) as StartTime
    , max(ended) as EndTime
from TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L a
where 1=1
and POLICY IN ('ld-imdb1_mssql','ldps_mssql','ld-hrdb01_rman','ld-hrdb01_rman_start','lpea-sqldb_mssql','cul-sqldb_mssql','lpdlvdb02_rman','lpdlvdb02_rman_start','lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms','lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg','lpenr-sqlclt-t_mssql','lpgcsdb_mssql','LEASEDB','JMDB','JUNJADB','purchqdb','jmtibdb','lpbakdb01_rman','lpbakdb01_rman_start','lpscsdb01_mssql')
and started between CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) AS DATETIME) and CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) + ' 23:59:59' AS DATETIME)
AND STATUS <= 1
group by case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end
-- having min(State)  = 'Done'

SELECT Client as POL_NM
     , StartTime
     , EndTime
  FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A
 WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING('2023-07-11T00:00:00Z',1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, '2023-07-11T09:13:34Z'))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
   --AND Client in ($PolicyName)

SELECT CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN SVC_NM WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN POL_NM END AS ServiceName
     , POL_NM, ELS_TM, MAX_ELS_TM, SOL_CL_CD
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 --WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName) --2023.07.21 서버조회조건제거
   -- AND SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
order by ServiceName

panels.title: Backup Batch Time Line(NetBackup) (🟦 : SAN 🟩 : NET)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end AS POL_NM
    --, FORMAT(AVG(started), 'HH:mm:ss') 
    , min(started) as StartTime
    , max(ended) as EndTime
from TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L a
where 1=1
and POLICY IN ('ld-imdb1_mssql','ldps_mssql','ld-hrdb01_rman','ld-hrdb01_rman_start','lpea-sqldb_mssql','cul-sqldb_mssql','dvdb2_rman','dvdb2_rman_start','lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms','lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg','lpenr-sqldb_mssql','lpgcsdb_mssql','LEASEDB','JMDB','JUNJADB','purchqdb','jmtibdb','lpbakdb01_rman','lpbakdb01_rman_start','lpscsdb01_mssql')
and started between CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) AS DATETIME) and CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) + ' 23:59:59' AS DATETIME)
AND STATUS <= 1
group by case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end
-- having min(State)  = 'Done'

SELECT Client as POL_NM
     , StartTime
     , EndTime
  FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A
 WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) AS DATETIME) and CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), GETDATE()-0, 120) + ' 23:59:59' AS DATETIME)
   AND A.Agent = 'SQL Server'

SELECT CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN SVC_NM WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN POL_NM END AS ServiceName
     , POL_NM, ELS_TM, MAX_ELS_TM, SOL_CL_CD
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 --WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName) --2023.07.21 서버조회조건제거
   -- AND SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
order by ServiceName

panels.title: Backup Batch Time Line(Comvault)  (🟦 : SAN 🟩 : NET)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end  AS POL_NM
     , max(Elapsed) AS Elapsed 
     , min(State) AS State
     , convert(int, avg(KB_Per_Sec)/1024) AS MB_Per_Sec
  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
 WHERE CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
   -- AND SCHEDULE = 'full_daily'
   AND STATUS <= 1
--    AND STATUS <> ''
   AND POLICY IN ($PolicyName)
group by CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') 
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end 
having min(State)  = 'Done'
order by time desc

SELECT CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN SVC_NM WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN POL_NM END AS ServiceName
     , POL_NM, ELS_TM, MAX_ELS_TM, SOL_CL_CD
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
   AND SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
order by ServiceName

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end  AS POL_NM
     , max(Elapsed) AS Elapsed 
     , min(State) AS State
     , convert(int, sum(Kilobytes)/1024/max(Elapsed)) AS MB_Per_Sec
  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
 WHERE CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
   -- AND SCHEDULE = 'full_daily'
   AND STATUS <= 1
--    AND STATUS <> ''
   AND POLICY IN ($PolicyName)
group by CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') 
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end 
having min(State)  = 'Done'
order by time desc

SELECT CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN SVC_NM WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN POL_NM END AS ServiceName
     , POL_NM, ELS_TM, MAX_ELS_TM, SOL_CL_CD
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
   AND SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
order by ServiceName

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN T1.ServiceName WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN T1.Policy END AS ServiceName
     -- , T1.Policy
     , T1.Elapsed
     -- , ((T1.ConvertSec * 1.0) / (T1.THRESHOLD * 1.0) * 100) - 100 AS ElapsedPerStd
     , MB_Per_Sec
  FROM (SELECT A.CollectDT
             , B.POL_NM AS Policy
             , B.SVC_NM AS ServiceName
             , CONVERT(INT, DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
             --Elapsed Per Time 계산
             , DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec
             , CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, STARTTIME) = 1 THEN B.MAX_ELS_TM
                    ELSE B.ELS_TM 
                END AS THRESHOLD
             , Throughput * 3600 / 1024 AS MB_Per_Sec
          FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A, TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M B
         WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
           AND A.CLIENT = B.POL_NM
           AND B.SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
           AND B.SOL_CL_CD = 'CON'
           AND A.Agent = 'SQL Server'
           AND A.Status = 'Completed'
 ) T1
ORDER BY time

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN T1.ServiceName WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN T1.Policy END AS ServiceName
     -- , T1.Policy
     , T1.Elapsed
     -- , ((T1.ConvertSec * 1.0) / (T1.THRESHOLD * 1.0) * 100) - 100 AS ElapsedPerStd
     , MB_Per_Sec
  FROM (SELECT A.CollectDT
             , B.POL_NM AS Policy
             , B.SVC_NM AS ServiceName
             , CONVERT(INT, DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
             --Elapsed Per Time 계산
             , DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec
             , CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, STARTTIME) = 1 THEN B.MAX_ELS_TM
                    ELSE B.ELS_TM 
                END AS THRESHOLD
             , Throughput * 1024 / 3600 AS MB_Per_Sec
          FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A, TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M B
         WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
           AND A.CLIENT = B.POL_NM
           AND B.SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
           AND B.SOL_CL_CD = 'CON'
           AND A.Agent = 'SQL Server'
           and A.Status = 'Completed'
 ) T1
ORDER BY time

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR,Started,112) + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , Policy
     , SUM(CONVERT(int,Kilobytes*(1-(Dedupe_Ratio/100))/1024))/1024 lpbakdb01_rman -- real_size_gb
  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
 WHERE Started between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
AND Policy in ('lpbakdb01_rman')
GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR,Started,112), Policy
ORDER BY 1

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR,Started,112) + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , Policy
     , SUM(CONVERT(int,Kilobytes*(1-(Dedupe_Ratio/100))/1024))/1024 lpsisdb_arc -- real_size_gb
  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
 WHERE Started between $__timeFrom() and $__timeTo()
AND Policy in ('lpsisdb_arc')
GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR,Started,112), Policy
ORDER BY 1

SELECT CollectDT time
     , CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN T1.ServiceName WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN T1.Policy END AS ServiceName
     -- , T1.Policy
     , T1.Elapsed
     -- , ((T1.ConvertSec * 1.0) / (T1.THRESHOLD * 1.0) * 100) - 100 AS ElapsedPerStd
     , MB_Per_Sec
  FROM (SELECT a.STARTTIME as CollectDT
             , B.POL_NM AS Policy
             , B.SVC_NM AS ServiceName
             , CONVERT(INT, DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
             --Elapsed Per Time 계산
             , DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec
             , CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, STARTTIME) = 1 THEN B.MAX_ELS_TM
                    ELSE B.ELS_TM 
                END AS THRESHOLD
             , Throughput * 3600 / 1024 AS MB_Per_Sec
          FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A, TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M B
         WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
           AND A.CLIENT = B.POL_NM
           AND B.SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
           AND B.SOL_CL_CD = 'CON'
           AND A.Agent != 'SQL Server'
           And A.Status = 'Completed'
 ) T1
ORDER BY time

SELECT CollectDT time
     , CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN T1.ServiceName WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN T1.Policy END AS ServiceName
     -- , T1.Policy
     , T1.Elapsed
     -- , ((T1.ConvertSec * 1.0) / (T1.THRESHOLD * 1.0) * 100) - 100 AS ElapsedPerStd
     , MB_Per_Sec
  FROM (SELECT a.STARTTIME as CollectDT
             , B.POL_NM AS Policy
             , B.SVC_NM AS ServiceName
             , CONVERT(INT, DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME)) AS Elapsed
             --Elapsed Per Time 계산
             , DATEDIFF(SECOND, STARTTIME, ENDTIME) AS ConvertSec
             , CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, STARTTIME) = 1 THEN B.MAX_ELS_TM
                    ELSE B.ELS_TM 
                END AS THRESHOLD
             , Throughput * 1024 / 3600 AS MB_Per_Sec
          FROM TB_CV_BAK_Stat_Chk_L A, TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M B
         WHERE A.CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
           AND A.CLIENT = B.POL_NM
           AND B.SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
           AND B.SOL_CL_CD = 'CON'
           AND A.Agent != 'SQL Server'
           And A.Status = 'Completed'
 ) T1
ORDER BY time

SELECT CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') time
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end  AS POL_NM
   --   , substring(convert(varchar, Started, 108),1,4) + '0 ' + case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end  AS POL_NM
   --   , convert(convert(varchar, Started, 108))
     , max(Elapsed) AS Elapsed 
   --   , min(State) AS State
   --   , convert(int, avg(KB_Per_Sec)/1024) AS MB_Per_Sec
  FROM TB_Bak_Stat_Chk_L
 WHERE CollectDT BETWEEN  REPLACE(SUBSTRING($__timeFrom(),1,10),'-','') AND  REPLACE(SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR,DATEADD(MONTH,1,CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()))-1, 112),1,10),'-','')
   -- AND SCHEDULE = 'full_daily'
   AND STATUS <= 1
--    AND STATUS <> ''
   -- AND POLICY IN ($PolicyName)
   -- and Policy not like '%fs'
   and policy in ('lpbakdb01_rman',
'lpsisdb_arc',
'lpdwsdb01_netezza',
'lpmosdb_arc',
'lpscsdb01_tr_fs',
'lpgcsdb01_tr_fs',
'lpenr-sqlclt-t_tr_fs',
'lpea-sqldb_tr_fs',
'lpgms-sqldb_tr_fs',
'lpscsdb01_mssql',
'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_lpgms',
'lpea-sqldb_mssql',
'lpbakdb02_rman',
'ld-hrdb01_rman',
'lpgcsdb_mssql',
'lpenr-sqlclt-t_mssql',
'lpgms-sqldb_mssql_stg'
)
   -- and Policy not like '%test%'
   and policy is not null
   and policy <> ''
group by CONVERT(DATETIME, CollectDT + ' ' + '00' + ':00:00') 
     , case when Policy like '%rman_start' then replace(Policy,'_start','') else Policy end
having min(State)  = 'Done'
order by time desc

SELECT CASE ${DisplayType:singlequote} WHEN 'ServiceName' THEN SVC_NM WHEN 'PolicyName' THEN POL_NM END AS ServiceName
     , POL_NM, ELS_TM, MAX_ELS_TM, SOL_CL_CD
  FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
 WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
   AND SOL_CL_CD = 'NET'
order by ServiceName

list.definition:
SELECT POL_NM
FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
list.name: PolicyName
list.query:
SELECT POL_NM
FROM TB_BAK_SOLPOL_M
WHERE SVC_NM IN ($ServiceName)
